Real-time accountability for digital impulses

It doesn’t have to be this way.

Betting apps. Explicit content. Endless feeds. Impulse spending. Guardrail creates friction at the exact moment your phone tries to pull you back in.

Join early access See how it works

The internet learned your weak moments.

Guardrail is for people tired of fighting casino-style apps, sexualized feeds, and algorithmic bait with nothing but raw willpower. Adorable strategy. Terrible odds.

01

Triggers are everywhere

Sportsbook promos, suggestive content, shopping hooks, and endless feeds are designed to catch you when you are tired or stressed.

02

Secrecy feeds the loop

The habit gets stronger when nobody knows. Guardrail makes the moment visible to someone you choose.

03

Friction changes behavior

A pause, text, or call can interrupt the spiral before it becomes another regret.

How it works

Put someone between the impulse and the action.

1
Choose your triggersApps, websites, categories, keywords, or time windows.
2
Add accountabilityPick a friend, spouse, sponsor, coach, or support group.
3
Set escalationWarning first, then text, call, or stronger check-in rules.
4
Interrupt the loopWhen a trigger opens, Guardrail activates your plan immediately.
Not shame. Not surveillance. Just enough friction to choose the next right move.

You are not weak. The system is engineered.

Guardrail gives you a practical defense: accountability at the moment it matters.

Join Early Access

Guardrail is an accountability tool, not therapy, medical care, or crisis support. If a behavior feels out of control, involve trusted people and consider professional help.
